title: blechnum durum
intro: Blechnum durum, also known as the hard fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum durum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Blechnum durum can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
